title: Create, Dragons, Farmin n' stuff
description: A mod pack that includes many mods including Create, Ice and Fire and Farmer's Delight
body:
![Create, Dragons, Farmin n' stuff Title ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdeac21a0f5db6b7081e33c6c6e0e27231b88bfd.png)

----

#### Create, Dragons, Farmin n' stuff is a mod pack focused on creating factories, adventuring and making a nice home.

**This mod pack includes**:
- **Regions unexplored** for overhauling the nether, the end and the overworld biomes.
- **Tectonic** makes world generation more exciting by adding steep mountains and cliffs.
- **Farmer's delight** and **Chef's Delight** add new food items and structures.
- **Create** and Lots of add-ons lets you build amazing factories.
- **Iron spells 'n spell books** for casting spells on your enemies or friends :).
